title: CSULB Hackathon
description: A 24-hour coding competition where students build projects, learn new tools, and collaborate with other developers.

title: Beach Concert Night
description: Live performances by student bands and local artists. Food trucks and merch stands available.

title: Intramural Soccer Kickoff
description: The first match of the intramural soccer season. Open to spectators and participants.

title: Startup Networking Night
description: Meet startup founders, investors, and students interested in building new ventures.

title: Cybersecurity Capture the Flag
description: Compete in hacking challenges and security puzzles. Beginners welcome.

title: Art & Sketch Meetup
description: Casual sketching meetup with artists from across campus.

title: Fitness Bootcamp
description: Outdoor bootcamp workout session led by certified trainers.

title: Game Development Workshop
description: Learn the basics of Unity and game design from experienced developers.

title: Poetry Open Mic
description: Students share poetry and spoken word performances.

title: Beach Volleyball Tournament
description: Teams compete in a campus-wide beach volleyball tournament.

title: AI and Ethics Panel
description: Panel discussion with professors and researchers about the future of AI.

title: Cultural Food Festival
description: Food stands from cultures around the world hosted by student organizations.
